title: Shaped Recipe
description: A shaped crafting recipe requiring ingredients in a specific pattern on the crafting grid.

assume_symmetry.description: If true, the recipe pattern can be mirrored horizontally.

group.description: An optional group identifier for recipe book organization.

key.description: Maps pattern characters to item definitions.

pattern.description: The crafting pattern as an array of strings. Each string represents a row, and each character maps to a key.

priority.description: Recipe priority for conflict resolution. Lower values have higher priority.

result.description: The crafting result or array of results.

tags.description: Tags that specify which crafting stations can use this recipe.

unlock.description: Conditions that must be met to unlock this recipe in the recipe book.

identifier.description: The unique identifier for this recipe.

ingredient.title: Ingredient
ingredient.description: An item definition used as an ingredient.

tag.description: An item tag that matches multiple items.

data.description: The item data/aux value for items with variants.
